description.value: **Benefit:** As a standard action, you can make a disarm or trip maneuver with your whip. If it succeeds, you can make an additional disarm or trip maneuver with the same bonus against a target adjacent to the first and also within your whipâs reach. In addition, you can use your whip to perform reposition maneuvers, though you take a â4 penalty on your CMB and you may only move the target toward you from its original position.
